description: Model performance tracking over time. Each entry represents an evaluation snapshot. Run benchmarks/compare.py --update-results to populate RPS and walk-forward fields.

academic_benchmarks.notes: Market consensus — effectively the ceiling for EPL 3-outcome prediction

entries.notes: Baseline. 80/20 chronological split. Run compare.py --update-results in Colab to fill RPS fields.
